_doc: Source-of-truth for new ERGSN catalog entries. Run `npm run build:products` after editing. Products listed here are APPENDED to the existing inline catalog — never overwritten. Field reference: see data/products.schema.json.

products.sub: Template row — remove this when you ship your first real product
products.desc: A sample entry illustrating every field the build pipeline consumes. `active: false` hides the entry from the live grid; flip to true to publish. Specs / features / tags are arrays; img path is relative to site root.
features: Placeholder bullet 1 — demonstrates the features array
Placeholder bullet 2 — replace with real value propositions
products.matchDesc: Placeholder row — shown by AI Partner Match when active=true.
